title: Ninjacart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ninjacart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
